locations.name: 昆拉德·雅各布·特明克
locations.summary: 昆拉德·雅各布·特明克（荷蘭語：Coenraad Jacob Temminck，1778年3月31日—1858年1月30日）是一名荷蘭貴族和動物學家。 生平 特明克於阿姆斯特丹出生，1820年出任位於萊頓的國家自然歷史博物館，直至去世。他…

locations.name: 澳大利亚
locations.summary: 澳大利亚联邦（英語：Commonwealth of Australia），通称澳大利亚、澳洲（Australia，缩写为AU、AUS），是一个位于南半球中北部、東半球东部的議會制君主立憲制、聯邦制國家。全国整体属于大洋洲（並非自成一洲），…

locations.name: Weipa
locations.summary: Weipa () is a coastal mining town in the local government area of Weipa Town in Queensland.

locations.name: Aurukun, Queensland
locations.summary: Aurukun is a town and coastal locality in the Shire of Aurukun and the Shire of Cook in Far North Queensland, Australia.

locations.name: Bega, New South Wales
locations.summary: Bega () is a town in the south-east of New South Wales, Australia, in the Bega Valley Shire.

locations.name: Atherton, Queensland
locations.summary: Atherton is a rural town and locality in the Tablelands Region, Queensland, Australia.

locations.name: 图文巴
locations.summary: 图文巴（英語：Toowoomba）為澳洲僅次於國都坎培拉的第二大內陸城市，乃昆士蘭州東南部的重要城市，人口123,406（2007年）；「圖文巴」於澳大利亞原住民語有接近於「沼澤地」之意；儘管與毗鄰的昆士蘭州東南部（South East…

relations.subject: 褐鹃鸠
relations.evidence: The brown cuckoo-dove (Macropygia phasianella) is a dove in the genus Macropygia found in Australia from Weipa and Aurukun in the north to Bega in the south, and most inland at Atherton and Toowoomba
